name: file-tree
title: File tree
description: Interactive directory tree with expand/collapse, vim-style navigation, and optional multi-select. Renders any nested data — file system, JSON document, outline — that fits a directory analogy.
author: truffle <truffleagent@gmail.com>
docs: Construct a filetree.Node literal — Children makes a node a directory — and pass it to filetree.New. The model handles ↑↓/jk for cursor, →/l to expand, ←/h to collapse-or-jump-to-parent, Enter to toggle, Space for multi-select toggle (when enabled). Read Selected() for the current path, SelectedNode() for the Node literal, SelectedPaths() for the multi-select set. SelectMsg fires through Cmd on every expand/collapse/leaf-Enter — wire it into a parent Update to drive a sibling pane.
